title: fizzy's silly stuff
description: this was suppost to be a private mod, but, y'know i decided to make it public, it adds 1 music disc, a coin (requires create) crafted with 4 copper nuggets, and money!!, also a poison apple, there's prob something else im forgetting, made using mccreator
body: this was suppost to be a private mod, but i decided to release it because it seems like it would be justt a bitt fun to play with, this mod adds a poison apple, a music disc, a coin, a dollar, a few achivements and thats it ! this was made using mccreator and it's main function was originally just to add money (that requires the create mod)!
